hero.subtitle: Find practice partners, chat and make video calls for free, with no middlemen.

images.avatar1: Portrait of Anna K., a language learner
images.avatar2: Portrait of a language exchange user

howItWorks.title: Three steps to confident conversations
howItWorks.subtitle: Starting language practice is easier than it seems — it only takes a few minutes.

01.title: Create a profile
01.desc: Add your native language, target languages and interests so we can match you with the right partners.

02.title: Find a partner
02.desc: Browse profiles, filter by language and level, and send language exchange invitations.

03.title: Start talking
03.desc: Chat or join a video call, and practice in real conversations with native speakers.

howItWorks.quote: “I found a regular English partner in a month — now we talk every week.”
